things.name: SeaCity Museum
things.description: Award-winning museum telling the stories of Southampton and its maritime heritage including the Titanic

things.name: Titanic Memorials
things.description: Moving memorials throughout the city to the engineers, musicians and crew who perished

things.name: Medieval Walls
things.description: Best-preserved medieval city walls in England stretching over a mile

things.name: Tudor House and Garden
things.description: Beautifully restored Tudor merchant's house with medieval garden

things.name: Solent Sky Museum
things.description: Aviation museum celebrating the Supermarine Spitfire, designed and built in Southampton

things.name: New Forest National Park
things.description: Ancient forest with free-roaming ponies just 15 minutes from the city centre

things.name: Ocean Village Marina
things.description: Lively waterfront development with restaurants, cinema and boat tours

things.name: Mayflower Park
things.description: Waterfront park where the Pilgrim Fathers set sail for America in 1620

things.name: Southampton City Art Gallery
things.description: Impressive collection of British art from the 19th century to the present

things.name: Paultons Park
things.description: Peppa Pig World and family theme park in the New Forest
